## What does this PR do?
Brief summary of the change.

## Why?
What problem does it fix or what does it improve?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI / style improvement
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Testing done
How did you verify this works? (e.g. "ran dev mode, imported a CSV, checked the savings tab")

## Screenshots (if UI changed)
Before / after screenshots help a lot for visual changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] App runs without crashing (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] No personal data or unrelated files included
- [ ] PR is focused on one change
